expectations.text: Uses @computed_field decorator with @property for derived fields
expectations.evidence: Lines 19-32: @computed_field with @cached_property (superior to @property for frozen models)

expectations.text: Uses frozen=True (required for immutability, also enables @cached_property if used)
Uses field_serializer or PlainSerializer for dollar formatting
expectations.evidence: Line 34: @field_serializer('price_dollars', 'tax_amount', 'total') — all three in one decorator

expectations.text: Computed fields have explicit return type annotations
expectations.evidence: Lines 21, 25, 31: all have -> float return type annotations
